All who have God against them have the word of God against them. Those that have a constant hatred to God and his people, as the carnal mind has, can only expect to be made desolate forever.

When we see the vanity of the world in the disappointments, losses, and trials others meet with, instead of showing ourselves greedy for worldly things, we should not hold them so tightly. In the multitude of words, not one is unknown to God; not even the most idle word; and the most daring is not above his rebuke. In the destruction of the enemies of the church, God designs his own glory; and we may be sure that he will not fail in his design. And when the fullness of the Jews and Gentiles comes into the church, all antichristian opposers shall be destroyed.
